curation.synopsis: In the long shadow of the Calth atrocity, Roboute Guilliman has set the first stones of a vast work — a book of doctrine that will one day be called the Codex Astartes — and ordered his Ultramarines to test it. Captain Ventanus of the Troublesome Fourth Company is given a sequence of exercises against an enemy his primarch never expected to write rules for: other Space Marines. Each scenario is a small war fought, lost and refought; each refinement another sentence in a manual whose author refuses to believe a Legion brother can be planned against. Out of this brutal apprenticeship, Ventanus begins to see what the Codex will eventually become — and the price the Ultramarines have already paid for needing it at all.
